title: Mastering Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn: Chapter 3 Quiz

questions.question: What is the main purpose of data preprocessing in machine learning?
options: To convert raw data into a clean data set
questions.correct_answer: To convert raw data into a clean data set
questions.explanation: Data preprocessing is essential to prepare raw data for analysis and improve model performance.

questions.question: Which technique is preferred when the data distribution is Gaussian?
questions.explanation: Standardization scales the data to have a mean of 0 and a standard deviation of 1, which is suitable for Gaussian distributions.

questions.question: Machine learning algorithms require numerical input, hence categorical data must be ___ before use.
questions.explanation: Encoding transforms categorical data into a numerical format that machine learning models can process.

questions.question: One method to handle missing data is ___, where specific strategies like mean, median, or mode are used to fill in the gaps.
questions.explanation: Imputation is a common technique employed to estimate and replace missing values in a dataset.
